project_description: Proof of concept: AI assistant for network specialists based on RAG. Knowledge base: hardware technical documentation (5000 documents), configuration procedures, historical failure logs. LangChain + Claude, web interface, response evaluation (RAGAS). Goal: PoC in 8 weeks, 20 pilot users.
client_history: First LLM project in the organization — PoC to evaluate value before investment.
risk_patterns: PoC: limited scope, acceptable quality 'good enough' — not production.
pm_comment: PoC delivered in 7 weeks. Production deployment decision made after positive feedback.
